user_outcome: A protocol maintainer sees the binary, vendored normative content, and supported Codex and Claude installations report and byte-match the exact Baton v0.15 pin.
rationale: This slice owns C-01 and performs the first permitted vendor/install activity after S01 makes that activity atomic. The mapped upstream delta is indivisible and therefore sits at the release's file ceiling. Installer writes are limited to Baton's documented user-level targets, contain no credentials, and are executed only after repository parity succeeds; there is no network, browser, PII, or accessibility contract beyond deterministic CLI output.
in_scope: Run the repaired vendor transaction from the exact v0.15.0 tag target 16a3b304f360ec9b6a0f2cc5544d019058ac687c and record source digest sha256:8acfaaabe27d93cfd6eeb0d8d9fba37261095e9e702826cc9e678f9ab8c3343b in VERSION.
Update the explicit mapping, schema embed, fixture, and grade manifest for spec-ambiguity-report-v1 and replace only mapped files whose v0.13.1-to-v0.15.0 upstream content changed.

Preserve normative JSON schema bytes exactly; only documented Sworn command-reference transformations may affect Markdown prompt/rule copies, and a second vendor --check plus sworn baton diff must report zero drift.

After repository parity passes, run the upstream install-codex.sh and install-claude.sh from the same pinned checkout and byte-compare their rule, role, command/skill, template, and schema outputs against that checkout with the documented Codex path rewrites accounted for.

Build the binary and prove sworn doctor, sworn doctor --sync-baton, the embedded schema manifest, and both supported local mirrors agree on C-01; any mismatch exits non-zero without rewriting an installation from an unverified source.
out_of_scope: Changing any Baton v0.15 normative wording or schema shape is upstream protocol design, not downstream adoption.
Interpreting or migrating active Sworn records belongs to S03 through S05 and S17; this slice updates only embedded protocol material and supported local mirrors.
Installing or upgrading the Sworn binary outside this repository is not part of the Baton mirror installation proof.
Business, hosted-service, provider, customer, and pricing material is prohibited from every vendored or proof artefact.

effort_complexity.rationale: The exact mapped delta spans twenty-five files and two supported installation mirrors, but the target bytes and expected pin are fully specified by C-01.

risks.description: The version line advances while one prompt, schema, fixture, or manifest entry remains stale.
risks.mitigation: Enumerate every mapping and SchemaMap entry from code, compare mapped normative bytes to the tag, and make TestBatonV015ExactParity fail on a missing, extra, transformed-JSON, or stale item.

risks.description: A local installer copies from a different checkout or partially replaces an existing mirror.
risks.mitigation: Resolve the installer source commit before execution, run repository parity first, use the upstream installers' bounded targets, and byte-check both mirrors before claiming success.

risks.description: Host-specific Codex path rewriting is mistaken for protocol drift or hides real drift.
risks.mitigation: Canonicalize only the two documented Claude-to-Codex path substitutions and compare every other byte exactly; mutation-test one unauthorized rewrite.

acceptance_criteria.text: WHEN TestBatonV015ExactParity enumerates the live mapping, schema embed, manifest, VERSION, prompts, rules, and fixtures THE SYSTEM SHALL prove C-01's exact tag, commit, archive digest, VERSION blob identity, complete mapped set, and byte-identical normative JSON with no unclassified schema.

WHEN the v0.15 vendor operation completes and is immediately followed by vendor --check and baton diff THE SYSTEM SHALL report zero repository drift and SHALL leave spec-ambiguity-report-v1 embedded, addressable, and classified independently from llm-check-report-v1.

WHEN the exact pinned checkout runs install-codex.sh -y and install-claude.sh -y after repository parity THE SYSTEM SHALL replace only the documented Baton targets and both installed mirrors SHALL byte-match v0.15, allowing only the installer's declared Codex path substitutions.

IF the embedded pin, any mapped byte, any installed mirror byte, or any schema classification differs from C-01 THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL make doctor --sync-baton or the parity proof exit non-zero and identify the divergent path without printing file payloads or credentials.
